result.stdout:
tye:
  Developer tools and publishing for microservices.

Usage:
  tye [options] [command]

Options:
  --no-default      Disable default options from environment variables
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
  --version         Show version information

Commands:
  init <path>        create a yaml manifest
  run <path>         run the application
  build <path>       build containers for the application
  push <path>        build and push application containers to registry
  deploy <path>      deploy the application
  undeploy <path>    delete deployed application

commands.payload:
tye:
  Developer tools and publishing for microservices.

Usage:
  tye [options] [command]

Options:
  --no-default      Disable default options from environment variables
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
  --version         Show version information

Commands:
  init <path>        create a yaml manifest
  run <path>         run the application
  build <path>       build containers for the application
  push <path>        build and push application containers to registry
  deploy <path>      deploy the application
  undeploy <path>    delete deployed application

result.stdout:
build:
  build containers for the application

Usage:
  tye build [options] [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>    file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

Options:
  -i, --interactive                     Interactive mode
  --tags <tags>                         Filter the group of running services
                                        by tag.
  -v, --verbosity <Debug|Info|Quiet>    Output verbosity
  -f, --framework <framework>           The target framework hint to use for
                                        all cross-targeting projects with
                                        multiple TFMs. This value must be a
                                        valid target framework for each
                                        individual cross-targeting project.
                                        Non-crosstargeting projects will
                                        ignore this hint and the value TFM
                                        configured in tye.yaml will override
                                        this hint.
  --no-default                          Disable default options from
                                        environment variables
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
deploy:
  deploy the application

Usage:
  tye deploy [options] [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>    file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

Options:
  -i, --interactive                     Interactive mode
  -v, --verbosity <Debug|Info|Quiet>    Output verbosity
  -n, --namespace <n>                   Specify the namespace for the
                                        deployment
  -f, --framework <framework>           The target framework hint to use for
                                        all cross-targeting projects with
                                        multiple TFMs. This value must be a
                                        valid target framework for each
                                        individual cross-targeting project.
                                        Non-crosstargeting projects will
                                        ignore this hint and the value TFM
                                        configured in tye.yaml will override
                                        this hint.
  --tags <tags>                         Filter the group of running services
                                        by tag.
  --force                               Override validation and force
                                        deployment.
  --no-default                          Disable default options from
                                        environment variables
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
init:
  create a yaml manifest

Usage:
  tye init [options] [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>    file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

Options:
  --force           Overrides the tye.yaml file if already present for
                    project.
  --no-default      Disable default options from environment variables
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
run:
  run the application

Usage:
  tye run [options] [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>    file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

Options:
  --no-build                            Do not build project files before
                                        running.
  --port <port>                         The port to run control plane on.
  --logs <logs>                         Write structured application logs to
                                        the specified log provider. Supported
                                        providers are 'console', 'elastic'
                                        (Elasticsearch), 'ai'
                                        (ApplicationInsights), 'seq'.
  --dtrace <trace>                      Write distributed traces to the
                                        specified tracing provider. Supported
                                        providers are 'zipkin'.
  --metrics <metrics>                   Write metrics to the specified metrics
                                        provider.
  --debug <service>                     Wait for debugger attach to specific
                                        service. Specify "*" to wait for all
                                        services.
  --docker                              Run projects as docker containers.
  --dashboard                           Launch dashboard on run.
  --watch                               Watches for code changes for all
                                        dotnet projects.
  -f, --framework <framework>           The target framework hint to use for
                                        all cross-targeting projects with
                                        multiple TFMs. This value must be a
                                        valid target framework for each
                                        individual cross-targeting project.
                                        Non-crosstargeting projects will
                                        ignore this hint and the value TFM
                                        configured in tye.yaml will override
                                        this hint.
  --tags <tags>                         Filter the group of running services
                                        by tag.
  -v, --verbosity <Debug|Info|Quiet>    Output verbosity
  --no-default                          Disable default options from
                                        environment variables
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
undeploy:
  delete deployed application

Usage:
  tye undeploy [options] [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>    file or directory, can be a yaml, sln, or project file

Options:
  -n, --namespace <n>                   Specify the namespace for the
                                        deployment
  -i, --interactive                     Interactive mode
  -v, --verbosity <Debug|Info|Quiet>    Output verbosity
  --tags <tags>                         Filter the group of running services
                                        by tag.
  --what-if                             print what would be deleted without
                                        making changes
  --no-default                          Disable default options from
                                        environment variables
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information
